chapter_title.en: Chapter of Beginning at Mecca and Ending at Medina

text: 3138 - رَوَى هِشَامُ بْنُ اَلْمُثَنَّى عَنْ سَدِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ لَهُ : «اِبْدَءُوا بِمَكَّةَ وَ اِخْتِمُوا بِنَا».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3138 - Hisham ibn al-Muthanna narrated from Sadeer, who narrated from Abu Ja’far (as), who said to him: "Begin with Mecca and conclude with us."
